name: Veeam Backup & Replication
description: Integrates with Veeam Backup and Replication REST API for backup job management, session monitoring, protected workload inventory, and repository status across virtual, physical, and cloud environments

actions.name: List Backup Jobs
actions.description: Retrieve all configured backup jobs including their schedules, targets, and current state

parameters.name: typeFilter
parameters.description: Filter by job type (Backup, BackupCopy, Replication, SureBackup)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of jobs to return

actions.name: Get Job Status
actions.description: Retrieve the current status and last run details of a specific backup job

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the backup job

actions.name: List Job Sessions
actions.description: Retrieve backup job session history showing execution results, duration, and transferred data

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Filter sessions by specific job ID

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Filter by session result (Success, Warning, Failed, None)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return

actions.name: List Protected Workloads
actions.description: Retrieve all protected virtual machines, physical servers, and cloud workloads managed by Veeam agents

parameters.name: platformFilter
parameters.description: Filter by platform type (VMware, HyperV, Windows, Linux, Cloud)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of workloads to return

actions.name: Trigger Backup
actions.description: Start an immediate backup for a specified job

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the backup job to start

actions.name: List Repositories
actions.description: Retrieve all backup repositories with capacity and utilization information
